overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along Venice Beach at sunset. The character traverses sandy beach, passes a lifeguard tower and the Del Perro Pier with its Ferris wheel, then wades into the Pacific Ocean as the sun sets over the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban beach with downtown skyline backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across sandy beach toward a lifeguard tower with the city skyline visible in the background

entered.detail: cluster of modern glass skyscrapers forming the city skyline
wooden lifeguard station with red and white flag on top
row of palm trees lining the beachfront
low-rise buildings and shops along the beach promenade

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the sandy beach during golden hour, with the downtown skyline visible in the distance to the left. Palm trees and beachfront buildings line the shore as the character approaches a lifeguard tower in the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach approaching the Del Perro Pier amusement structure

events.description: passing the lifeguard tower, revealing the Del Perro Pier with Ferris wheel ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the beach past the lifeguard station, heading toward the pier structure

entered.detail: large wooden pier structure extending into the ocean with amusement park facilities
large white Ferris wheel at the end of the pier

segments.scene_description: The character passes the lifeguard tower on the left as the Del Perro Pier with its prominent Ferris wheel comes into view ahead. The city skyline fades from view as the camera turns slightly toward the pier structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: shoreline at Del Perro Pier with waves lapping at the sand

events.description: character steps into the shallow ocean water, transitioning from dry sand to wet surf

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge at the pier, then stepping into the shallow ocean water

notable_agents.action: person walking along the shoreline near the pier

entered.detail: support pillars of the pier structure along the water's edge
partially submerged structure or wreckage in the shallow water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the shoreline at the base of the Del Perro Pier, passing wooden support pillars. Around the 28-second mark, the character steps into the shallow ocean water, transitioning from sand to surf as the pier structure recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow ocean water along the beach

events.description: character turns to walk parallel to the shoreline, following the water's edge

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow ocean water, walking parallel to the beach and approaching another person on the shore

notable_agents.action: person standing on the beach ahead, facing toward the water

entered.detail: sandy beach forming the shoreline boundary to the left

segments.scene_description: The character continues wading through the shallow ocean water, moving away from the pier. The camera turns to follow the shoreline, revealing the beach to the left and another person standing on the sand ahead as the sun reflects off the water's surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a golden-hour beach that gradually transitions from a city-adjacent shoreline into the shallow surf of the Pacific Ocean. It begins with the character walking across the sand toward a central lifeguard tower, with the downtown skyline and palm trees visible in the distance. As the character passes the tower, the city skyline fades from view and the camera turns toward the looming structure of the Del Perro Pier and its prominent Ferris wheel. The scene then shifts as the character walks along the base of the pier past wooden support pillars before stepping from the sand into the shallow ocean water. Finally, the camera follows the character wading further into the surf, moving away from the pier to reveal the reflecting water and another person standing on the distant shoreline.
